Predictions concerning profession are troublesome because of the
complex nature of modern. social. economic, and political conditions.
The texts we have are helpful only in giving us a broad outine. On the
basis of ttlese texts we have to fill in and readjust certain inplications
contained in the statements.
Mantreswara, for instance, states: "'ne ought to predict the
acquisition of money by determining whether the Ascendant or the
sign occupied by the Sun or the Moon is stronger. Then find out the
planet located in the lOth house from these. and the Navamsa sign
occupied by the lord of that sign. The sun refers to the father. the
Moon to the mother, Mars to foe. Mercury to friend. Jupiter to brother.
Venus to the wife. and Saturn to servant". (S.U.
